creator: it@kancelariapraetor.pl
text:
Hi, at first sorry for my english.

I tried to use bhyve with Windows2012R2 without any updates on latest freenas (FreeBSD 10.3-STABLE (FreeNAS.amd64) #0 r295946+0ea9076(9.10-STABLE)). 
System boots without any problems, AD wokrs very well but I cant install Remote Desktop Services Role. 

I tried with many options - on zvol, img, with and without Windows updates, Windows 2012R2, 2016 and everytime I got Failed on first role -  "Remote Desktop Services role services"  or "Remote Desktop connection Broker" when i try to install only this single role.

PS. I got same problem on clean freebsd 11.0 release
